rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §21.051, which governs field-based experience requirements for teacher certification candidates. No overlap exists.
quote: Sec. 21.051. RULES REGARDING FIELD-BASED EXPERIENCE AND OPTIONS FOR FIELD EXPERIENCE AND INTERNSHIPS.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to educator certification field experience, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
